segments.text: And Ben-hadad the king of Syria gathered all his host together: and there were thirty and two kings with him, and horses, and chariots: and he went up and besieged Samaria, and warred against it.
And he sent messengers to Ahab king of Israel into the city, and said unto him,
Thy silver and thy gold is mine; thy wives also and thy children, even the goodliest, are mine.
segments.speaker: Ben-hadad

segments.text: My lord, O king, according to thy saying, I am thine, and all that I have.
segments.speaker: Ahab

segments.text: And, behold, there came a prophet unto Ahab king of Israel, saying,
Hast thou seen all this great multitude? behold, I will deliver it into thine hand this day; and thou shalt know that I am the LORD.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: And the prophet came to the king of Israel, and said unto him,
Go, strengthen thyself, and mark, and see what thou doest: for at the return of the year the king of Syria will come up against thee.
segments.speaker: Prophet

segments.text: And there came a man of God, and spake unto the king of Israel, and said,
Because the Syrians have said, The LORD is God of the hills, but he is not God of the valleys, therefore will I deliver all this great multitude into thine hand, and ye shall know that I am the LORD.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Because thou hast let go out of thy hand a man whom I appointed to utter destruction, therefore thy life shall go for his life, and thy people for his people.
segments.speaker: God
